commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component has significant structural and design system issues. Multiple versions of subcomponents exist (WeatherMetric and ForecastItem defined twice with inconsistent implementations), hardcoded pixel values (24, 8, 16, 20) instead of design tokens are scattered throughout, and critical data formatting logic in hooks.ts is never actually used in the rendered output. The wind speed unit logic is broken (checks if unit is '°F' instead of checking the unit type), and the weather icon never dynamically maps the condition prop to appropriate emojis using the WEATHER_ICONS constant.
